description: Building scalable HRMS and SaaS modules across the MERN stack, leading Shopify development for sister brands, and shipping SEO-first Next.js landing pages.
responsibilities: Designed and shipped scalable HRMS modules — Document Directory, Offboarding, and Expense Reports — on the MERN stack
Architected a Performance Management System (PMS) on MERN + TypeScript with structured evaluation workflows
Built REST APIs in Node.js and Express for employee lifecycle, configuration, goal tracking, and reviews
Implemented a Shift Week Roster module that cut manual scheduling time by 40%
Integrated Jira with the internal Woco Support system via API-based bi-directional sync
Led Shopify development for sister brands Somersault and Aquatan — dynamic sections, new features, and critical bug fixes
Built SEO-friendly, responsive Next.js landing pages and optimized for load speed, SEO, and cross-browser compatibility
Designed MongoDB schemas for scalable storage and efficient querying, and reviewed code for performance and maintainability

description: Contributed to a SaaS product for the hospitality industry — feature design, implementation, and iteration cycles.
responsibilities: Built user-centric modules that improved operational efficiency and client satisfaction
Developed and optimized the marketing site for responsiveness and accessibility across devices
Engaged in software testing, debugging, and routine maintenance to keep downtime minimal
